inputs.prompt: Generate a photo of an 18 - year - old East Asian coser. She is full of youthful vitality, cute, charming and has a good figure. The photo should present a realistic cosplay shooting texture. She cosplays the main character in the original picture, retaining the same clothing and pose. The skin and clothing should have a real - life texture. Place an easel at the back - side of the coser to display the original picture. The location is set at Comiket in Tokyo. She maintains the same pose, looking like a real person stepping out of an illustration, with a perfect and delicate face, straight hair, big eyes, and a lively expression. The coser should be the main body of the picture, taking up a large proportion in the frame.
